loading.subtitle: We are confirming your email verification link.

success.title: Email verified
success.subtitle: Your account is ready. Sign in to continue.

error.title: Verification failed
error.subtitle: We could not verify that link.

errors.missingToken: This verification link is incomplete. Open the latest email and try again.
errors.InvalidToken: This verification link is invalid. Request a new verification email and try again.
errors.ExpiredToken: This verification link has expired. Request a new verification email and try again.
errors.AlreadyVerified: This email has already been verified. Sign in to continue.
errors.generalError: We could not verify your email. Request a new verification email and try again.
